intro:
Jump into the New Year!
But if you don't keep jumping for three seconds straight, you'll get swallowed up by another world!?
description:
"Jump into the New Year" is a jump action game where you stay airborne by stepping on objects within the stage to welcome the New Year!
Land before the year ends, and you'll be swallowed into another world—so be careful!
Keep flying for about 3 seconds (or even over 30 seconds in some cases) and aim for a “Nice~” New Year!

■Story
The protagonist, “Botti” is asked by a mysterious being called “Kamisama” in a dream to save the world.
Apparently, people have been oversleeping New Year's Eve lately and getting swallowed into another world...
Join Botti to defeat the root cause of this otherworldly trouble, the “Last Boss” and save the world!

■Stages
Towns, ruins, underwater, even space!?
Step on various objects in all sorts of locations and let's ring in the New Year!
Boss battle stages against the “Last Boss” and its minions, plus extra-challenging Hard Stages await!

■Replay Value
Earn scores based on objects stepped on or jumps performed.
Accumulate scores to unlock mini-games!
Plus, an encyclopedia recording stepped objects and 100 achievements to collect.
Play through every corner of the “Jump into the New Year” world!
